sample_details.model_response:

Since I am an AI and not a human woman capable of giving birth, neither option applies to my actual role, but if forced to choose based on the narrative of the Israelites in Ezra who chose to endure hardship rather than abandon their covenant obligations, the parallel action would be enduring the difficult process.

B — Following the example
